ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used in the experiment */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used in the experiment */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Machine learning algorithm used in the experiment */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters used in the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who ran the experiment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the experiment belongs to */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the experiment */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment where the experiment was run */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the experiment */,
  "estimated_runtime" INTEGER /* Estimated runtime of the experiment */,
  "actual_runtime" INTEGER /* Actual runtime of the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Machine learning algorithm used in the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the model belongs to */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Last date the model was modified */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the model is public or private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the dataset */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the dataset belongs to */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was uploaded */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Last date the dataset was modified */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the dataset is public or private */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment that generated the result */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "roc_auc" REAL /* ROC AUC of the model */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model */,
  "scorer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the custom scorer used */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the result */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the result belongs to */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the result was generated */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Last date the result was modified */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_scorer_id FOREIGN KEY ("scorer_id") REFERENCES scorers ("scorer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scorers" (
  "scorer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scorer */,
  "scorer_name" TEXT /* Name of the scorer */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the scorer */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the scorer */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the scorer belongs to */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the scorer was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Last date the scorer was modified */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the scorer */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the scorer is public or private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scorer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the user belongs to */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Last date the user account was modified */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment that triggered the notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message sent in the notification */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the notification belongs to */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Last date the notification was modified */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification has been read */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the project was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Last date the project was modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
